prompt: A high-end beauty commercial photograph featuring a close-up of a young East Asian woman with flawless, dewy glass skin. She rests her face gently against her hands and bare arms on a pristine white surface, looking directly at the camera with a soft, serene expression. Her dark hair is loosely pulled back with delicate strands framing her face. In the foreground sits a frosted glass serum bottle with a silver pump, displaying the text "LUVIN" and "CALMING MOISTURE SERUM". The background is a soft, bright off-white studio setting. Elegant Korean typography is arranged on the left side, featuring the large main headline "오늘, 피부는 스스로 빛난다". Smaller supporting text above reads "자연에서 찾은 피부의 균형", and text below reads "루빈 카밍 모이스처 세럼" and "민감해진 피부에 전하는 부드럽고 깊은 보습". The brand name "LUVIN" appears again in the bottom left corner. A tiny drop of clear serum rests on the surface near the bottom left. The lighting is soft, diffused, and luminous, emphasizing a clean, minimalist skincare aesthetic.
